name: markdown-converter
tagline: ClawHub (186★): Convert documents and files to Markdown using markitdown. Use when converting PDF, Word (.docx), PowerPoint (.pptx), Excel
verdict: Assumes uv/uvx is already installed with no check or install hint, and the Azure Document Intelligence path silently requires a pre-configured Azure resource — miss either and it just fails. No version tracking, and no stated boundary across its many format-specific paths. Quality is otherwise good.

highlights.summary: No mention anywhere of what to do if markitdown fails, an unsupported/corrupt file is given, the network-dependent YouTube/Azure path errors, or uvx/markitdown is missing — total s
